Bug Title: Sign In Button Not Translated & Password & Eye Icon Misaligned in Arabic Version
Description: In the Arabic version of the application, the Sign In button is still displayed in English. Additionally, the password visibility (eye) icon is not positioned correctly
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Switch the application language to Arabic.
2. Navigate to the Login/Sign In page.
3. Observe the Sign In button text and password field.
Expected Result:
The Sign In button should be translated into Arabic.

The password eye icon should be properly aligned according to RTL layout.
Actual Result:
The Sign In button remains in English.

The password eye icon is incorrectly positioned.

Bug Title: Language Toggle Incorrectly Defaults to English When Site is in Arabic
Description: When the website is loaded with Arabic as the default language, the language toggle incorrectly shows English (ENG)
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to website 
2. The website default language to Arabic.
3. Observe the language toggle selection.
Expected Result: The language toggle should automatically select and display Arabic as the active language.
Actual Result: The language toggle incorrectly shows English (ENG) as selected, even though the site content is in Arabic.

Bug Title: Logout Popup Not Translated in Arabic Version
Description: In the Arabic version of the application, the logout confirmation popup is still displayed in English instead of Arabic.
Steps to Reproduce:
1.Switch the application language to Arabic.
2. Click on the Logout button.
3. Observe the logout confirmation popup.
Expected Result: The logout popup should be fully translated into Arabic.
Actual Result: The logout popup is displayed in English.

Bug Title: Footer Section Not Fully Translated in Arabic Version
Description: In the Arabic version of the website, the footer section is not completely translated. Some texts are still displayed in English,
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Switch the website language to Arabic.
2. Scroll down to the footer section.
3. Observe the text content.
Expected Result: All footer section content should be fully translated into Arabic.
Actual Result: Some parts of the footer are still shown in English.

Description: The video timing/duration indicator is not positioned correctly on the video player UI. This causes misalignment and affects the user experience.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. login website as student
2. click course
3. view course details
4. Observe vedio time position
Expected Result: The video timing should be properly aligned within the video player
Actual Result: The video timing is incorrectly positioned and overlapping.

Bug Title: Login & Logout Success Popups Not Translated in Arabic Version
Description: In the Arabic version of the application, the login and logout success popups are still displayed in English instead of Arabic.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Switch the application language to Arabic.
2. Perform a login action.
3. Observe the success popup message.
4. Perform a logout action.
5. Observe the success popup message.
Expected Result: Both login and logout success popups should be fully translated into Arabic.
Actual Result: The success popup messages are displayed in English.

Bug Title: “Connect Now” Button & Logo to Be Partially Hidden(website)
Description: In the Contact Us section, when clicking the “Connect Now” button, the UI layout breaks and results in the button and logo being partially hidden.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Navigate to the Contact Us page.
2. Click on the “Connect Now” button.
3. Observe the layout after clicking.
Expected Result: The button and logo should remain fully visible and properly aligned.
Actual Result: The button and logo become partially hidden after clicking “Connect Now.”

Bug Title: Manual Subscriber Form – “Assign Plan” Button Not Translated in Arabic Version(admin panel)
Description: In Subscriber Management, when clicking Manual Subscriber, the form that opens displays the “Assign Plan” button in English even when the site language is set to Arabic.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Navigate to Subscriber Management.
2. Click on Manual Subscriber to open the form.
3. Observe the Assign Plan button.
Expected Result: The Assign Plan button should be fully translated into Arabic when the site language is Arabic.
Actual Result: The Assign Plan button remains in English.

Bug Title: “About” Section Not Translated in Arabic (Admin & Org Panel)
Description: In the Organization Panel, Course Management → Course Overview, the “About” section is not translated into Arabic when the language is set to Arabic.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Log in to the Organization Panel.
2. Navigate to Course Management.
3. Click on any course.
4. Open the Course Overview page.
5. Check the “About” section content.
Expected Result: The “About” section should be fully translated into Arabic when the selected language is Arabic.
